name: knowledge_lifecycle
description: Knowledge recording and lifecycle workflow. Classify → write → check promote.

nodes.description: Classify incoming knowledge: official doc → skills/external, inference → dynamic. Read checklist and report classification basis.
nodes.instruction: Read checklist: shared/workflows/checklists/knowledge_lifecycle__classify_knowledge.yaml. Classification rules: (1) Official doc / user-confirmed fact → .claude/skills-on-demand/ (走 /promote 升級路徑); (2) Inference / single case / observed pattern → kb.py add-learning (DB is source of truth; dynamic/*.md are auto-generated exports). Complete with either `checklist_responses` or compact `{"summary":"<classification basis>"}` for this single-item checklist.

nodes.description: Write knowledge to kb_index.db via kb.py (source of truth). M2 validator checks status field in DB, not .md marker.
nodes.instruction: For decisions: bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/kb.py add-decision --id D-NNN --project <PROJECT_ID|system|ai-office|shared> ... For learnings: bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/kb.py add-learning --id <prefix>-LNN --project <PROJECT_ID|system|ai-office|shared> --title '...' --date YYYY-MM-DD --content '...' --confidence high|medium|low [--status draft|active|mature|promoted|stale|archived]. If uncertain, check `bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/kb.py add-learning -h` before writing. Do not substitute internal scorer values such as `0.90` for `--confidence`; the runtime CLI contract is the enum `high|medium|low`. EVO-016: kb.py writes DB only; .md export refreshed by post_task refresh_kb_exports node or `kb.py export all`. When completing this node, pass `kb_entry_ids` in outputs so M2 validator checks the exact DB rows written this round.

required_outputs.description: KB entry ids written to DB

nodes.description: Sync dynamic KB changes to kb_index.db and refresh markdown exports after writing
nodes.instruction: Run in sequence: (1) bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/kb.py build-edges  (2) bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/kb.py export all  (3) bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/kb.py sync  — step 3 rebuilds FTS5 index and generates embeddings for any new nodes (version-tracked, only re-embeds nodes missing current embed_version). Complete with `{"index_synced":true,"exports_refreshed":true}`.

nodes.description: Scan newly written KB entries for capability-related semantic relation follow-up reminders
nodes.instruction: Run `bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/indexing_reminder.py sync-kb --entry-id <id1> --entry-id <id2> ...` using the exact `kb_entry_ids` produced by write_to_dynamic, then complete with `{"indexing_reminders_synced":true}`. kb.py already handles local embedding writes; this reminder step is only for capability-related semantic relation follow-up.

nodes.description: （選用）當本輪新增節點 ≥ 3 個時，啟動 gpt-oss LLM 關係抽取，將候選邊寫入 edge_proposals staging table，待人工 review-edges 審核後才升至 edges。
nodes.instruction: 僅在 `kb_entry_ids` 含 ≥ 3 個 entry 時執行。先 dry-run 確認批次大小：bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/kb.py extract-edges --batch-size 20 --dry-run。如無異常，正式執行（去掉 --dry-run）。完成後以 `{"edge_proposals_queued": <int>}` complete，0 亦可。不需執行時直接 complete `{"edge_proposals_queued": 0, "skipped": true}`。注意：gpt-oss 呼叫必須序列＋3 秒延遲，禁止並發。

required_outputs.description: 本輪排入 edge_proposals 的候選邊數量

nodes.description: Check if dynamic KB has enough validated entries to suggest /promote
nodes.instruction: Count active learning entries whose meta_json confidence is `high`. Complete with `{"active_high_count": <int>, "suggest_run_promote": <bool>, "reason": "<brief>"}` where `suggest_run_promote` is true iff `active_high_count >= 5`.
